Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-17-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VICTOR DE SOUZA'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint.

Defendant Victor De Souza's motion to strike portions of Plaintiff Stephanie Berg's complaint is granted. (see word minutes for full details) Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
